title: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) Stock Price Prediction: 2026, 2027, 2030
text: Analyst forecasts for Virgin Galactic stock show significant variation reflecting the speculative nature of its business model. According to 5-17 analysts covering the stock, Virgin Galactic has a Hold consensus rating with price targets ranging from $2.00 to $36.00 and an average price target of $3.06-$6.08. Goldman Sachs' highest forecast of $36 demonstrates the vast potential analysts see in the company's space tourism business. However, Wells Fargo's lowest price target of $0.75 demonstrates dramatic differences in analysts' expectations regarding execution risk. Virgin Galactic trades around $2.89 per share as of April 2026, with shares down nearly 50% year-to-date as investors question the company's ability to tap the commercial opportunity of space exploration. For 2027, 10 Wall Street analysts forecast SPCE's revenue to be $29.2 billion on average, with forecasts ranging from $20 billion to $45.7 billion. However, the reality is more modest currently, with Q1 2026 showing only minimal revenue recorded as the company remains in its pre-revenue phase.
